user.title: Connect to WAHA WhatsApp
user.description: Configure the connection to your WAHA instance. Make sure the WAHA addon is running before proceeding.

data.api_key: API Key (leave empty if not configured)

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of WAHA (use 'localhost' if WAHA runs as a HA addon)
data_description.api_key: The same API key configured in the WAHA addon options

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to WAHA. Check host, port and API key.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This WAHA instance is already configured.
